LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-18-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP'S MOTION FOR NON-MONETARY SANCTIONS, MONETARY SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP'S MOTION FOR NON-MONETARY SANCTIONS, MONETARY SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED GROUNDS FOR ISSUANCE OF SANCTIONS UNDER CCP SECTION 128.5 OR 128.7. THIS ORDER IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF EITHER FILING A MOTION UNDER THE DISCOVERY CODE FOR ISSUE PRECLUSION SANCTIONS AND/OR A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION BASED ON FACTUALLY DEVOID DISCOVERY RESPONSES. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM MAILTO:MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/SRB)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-31-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Set For Trial On Dec-12-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Montgomery Sansome Lp'S Motion For Non-Monetary Sanctions, Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
J.T. Williams, Esq., Attorney at Law, 415.666.6163, for MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP, Plaintiff.
Alexander M. Kallis, Esq., Law Offices of Alexander Kallis, 650-576-2878, for MACINA TAYLOR, Defendant.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Plaintiff Montgomery Sansome Lp'S Motion For Non-Monetary Sanctions, Monetary Sanctions

Plaintiff's Motion for Sanctions is denied. The Court finds that Plaintiff has not established grounds for issuance of sanctions under CCP section 128.5 or 128.7. This order is without prejudice to Plaintiff either filing a motion under the discovery code for issue preclusion sanctions and/or a motion for summary judgment/adjudication based on factually devoid discovery responses. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/SRB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court notes that an email correspondence was received noting a substitution of attorney will be filed today and this motion is withdrawn. The Court rules as follows:

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANT MACINA TAYLOR is taken off calendar; withdrawn by moving party.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion Of Plaintiff For Non-Monetary Sanctions, Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP's Motion For Non-Monetary Sanctions, Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tenative ruling.

Matter transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar in department 301 at 9:00am on the same day.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Plaintiff Montgomery Sansome Lp'S Motion For Non-Monetary Sanctions, Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-18-2022 Continued To Feb-24-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Stephen Sayad, Esq. (415.666.6163; stephensayad@gmail.com) for Plaintiff.
Christopher Guerrero, Esq. (415.543.6462; chris@guerrerolaw.net) for Defendant.

Counsel for Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Montgomery Sansome LP'S Motion For Non-Monetary Sanctions, Monetary Sanctions:
The matter is continued to February 24, 2022 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation.
